---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---

<!--
# Longest-neurite-length quantification across DMSO / CK-666 / washout

## What this file does

Reads per-neuron longest-neurite-length CSVs from `folder_path` (`list.files`
at line 53, loaded line 57) for the CK-666 washout experiment (DMSO,
CK-666-treated, washout from DMSO, washout from CK-666). Per-neuron length
distributions are pooled by condition and overlaid as violin + boxplot with
a bar-chart summary. Two PDFs are written (`ggsave` at lines 143, 242).

## Manuscript panel

**ED Fig 4h**: "The longest neurite length of neurons treated with CK-666 or
control (DMSO) and after washout. Data point number N represents the number
of neurons from 3 independent experiments: before treatment (Before), 98;
DMSO treated, 146; CK-666 treated, 161; washout from DMSO, 68; washout from
CK666, 124. Two-tailed Kruskal-Wallis test followed by Dunn's post-hoc test
with Bonferroni correction. Exact P values are shown."

Source Data: `ED Fig 4h`.

## Outputs

- Two PDFs (`ggsave` at lines 143, 242).

## Original G:\ source

G:/Figure S4_CK666/Fig. S4h/Morpho_quant.Rmd
-->

```{r message=FALSE}

library(pracma)
library(peakPick)
library(quantmod)
library(ggpmisc)
library(tidyverse)
library(magrittr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggfortify)
library(forecast)
library(tsibble)
library(broom)
library(tidyquant)
library(tsbox)
library("pheatmap")
library("RColorBrewer")
library(ggpmisc)
library(ggfortify)
library(viridis) # Default Color Maps from 'matplotlib' 
library(hrbrthemes)
library(circular)
library("gridExtra") 
library("ggExtra") 
library("ggpubr")
```

```{r Load RData, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
dir  <- dirname(rstudioapi::getSourceEditorContext()$path)
setwd(dir)
saved_path <- paste(dir, "Morpho_quant.RData",  sep = "/")
load(file=saved_path)

#save.image(file=saved_path)

```

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(purrr)
library(stringr)
library(data.table)

# set the directory where the CSV files are located
folder_path <- dir

# recursively find all CSV files in the directory and subdirectories
file_paths <- list.files(path = folder_path, pattern = "\\.csv$", recursive = TRUE, full.names = TRUE)
folder_name <- basename(dirname(file_paths))

# read all CSV files into a list of data frames
 data_list <- file_paths %>% map(read.csv)
 
 for (n in 1: length(data_list)){

   data_list[[n]]$Exp <- folder_name[n]
   
 }

# combine all data frames into a single data frame
data_df <- data_list %>% reduce(bind_rows)

data_df$Event <- "Pre"
data_df$Treatment <- "DMSO"

data_df[data_df$Label %like% "Post", ]$Event <- "Post"
data_df[data_df$Label %like% "WO", ]$Event <- "WO"
data_df[data_df$Label %like% "CK666", ]$Treatment <- "CK666"

data_df$Event_treatment <- paste(data_df$Event, data_df$Treatment, sep= "_")

data_df <- data_df %>% as.data.table()

data_df$Cell <- "test"
n <- data_df[Length == 0] %>% nrow()

data_df[Length == 0]$Cell <- paste("Cell_", 1:n, sep="")

for (n in 2:nrow(data_df))
{
  if(data_df$Length[n] > 0){
    
    data_df$Cell[n] <- data_df$Cell[n-1]

    } else {
              }

}
```

# Extract cell level dataframe
```{r}
df_Cell<- data_df[Length == 0]
df_Cell$Longest <- 0
df_Cell$Longest_2 <- 0
df_Cell$Neurite_No <- 0

for (n in 1:nrow(df_Cell))
{
df_Cell$Longest[n] <- data_df[ Cell == df_Cell$Cell[n]]$Length %>% max() # get the longest neurite length
df_Cell$Neurite_No[n] <- data_df[Cell == df_Cell$Cell[n]] %>% nrow() - 1 # get the neurite number
}

for (n in 1:nrow(df_Cell))
{
  
  if(df_Cell$Neurite_No[n] >= 2){
    
    x <- data_df[ Cell == df_Cell$Cell[n]]$Length %>% sort()
    df_Cell$Longest_2[n] <- x[length(x)-1]

    } else { 
      
      df_Cell$Longest_2[n] <- 0 
      
              }
  
}

```

```{r message = FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.width=5}
ylim1 = boxplot.stats(df_Cell$Longest)$stats[c(1, 5)] #+ coord_cartesian(ylim = ylim1*1.05) 
my_comparisons <- list( c("Post_CK666", "Post_DMSO"), c("WO_CK666", "WO_DMSO"), c("Pre_DMSO", "Post_CK666"), c("Post_DMSO", "WO_CK666"), c("Post_CK666", "WO_CK666") )

df_Cell %>%
  mutate(Event_treatment = fct_relevel(Event_treatment, 
            "Pre_DMSO", "Post_DMSO", "Post_CK666", "WO_DMSO", "WO_CK666")) %>% 
ggplot( aes(x=Event_treatment, y=Longest, fill=Event_treatment)) + scale_fill_brewer(palette="Dark2") + theme_classic()+
  geom_violin(trim=F, kernel ="gaussian", adjust=0.8) +
  geom_boxplot(width=0.1, fill="white") +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), limit= c(-20, 1000), breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 5)) +
  stat_compare_means(comparisons = my_comparisons, label.y = c(440, 800, 550, 900, 700)) # Add pairwise comparisons p-value
 # stat_compare_means(label.y = 600)     # Add global p-value 
```

```{r}
ggsave(
  "Longest.eps",
  plot = last_plot(),
  device = "eps")
```

```{r}

my_comparisons <- list( c("Soma", "GC"), c("GC", "NT"), c("Soma", "NT") )

# ggplot(frame_freq_OL, aes(x=Type, y=Freq)) + geom_boxplot(aes(x = Type)) + coord_cartesian(ylim = ylim1*1.05)

frame_freq_OL %>% ggboxplot(x = "Type", y = "Freq", color = "Type", palette = "jco") +  theme(legend.position="right") +
  stat_compare_means(comparisons = my_comparisons, label.y = c(14, 16, 18))+ # Add pairwise comparisons p-value
  stat_compare_means(label.y = 20)     # Add global p-value
```

# Calculate SD and Mean
```{r}
# stacked_ccf_mat <- selected_ccf2 %>% gather(Neurite, ccf, -lag) %>% as.data.table()  

df_summary <- df_Cell %>% group_by(Event_treatment) %>% rstatix::get_summary_stats(Longest_2)
```

```{r}
df_summary %>% 
ggplot(aes(x=Event_treatment, y=mean)) + 
  geom_bar(stat="identity", position=position_dodge()) +
         geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=mean-se, ymax=mean+se), width=.2,position=position_dodge(.9)) + 
          scale_fill_brewer(palette="Paired") + theme_minimal()

```

```{r}
for (n in 1:length(MSD_list)) 
{
  padded<-sprintf("%02d", n)
  MSD_list[[n]]$Region <- paste("Region_", padded)
  MSD_list[[n]]$Type<- dirname(MSD_file[n]) %>% dirname() %>% basename()
}

MSD_list[[1]] %>% names()

# combine MSD dfs
MSD<- MSD_list[[1]]

for (n in 2:length(MSD_list)) 
{
  MSD <- rbind(MSD, MSD_list[[n]])
 
}
```

```{r}
MSD_ggplot_list <- list()

for (n in 1:16) 
{
  MSD_ggplot_list[[n]] <- ggplot(MSD, aes_string(x="Type", y=names(MSD)[n], fill="Type")) 
}

names(MSD_ggplot_list)<- c("X1", "Tra", "Tra_length", "MSS_slope", "MSS_yIn", "MSD_slope", "MSD_yIn", "DiffCoef", "Dist", "AvgDist", "Straightness", "Bending", "BendingLinear", "Efficiency", "PixelSize", "TimeInterval")
```

```{r  message = FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.width=8}

fig_A <- ggplot(frame_freq_OL, aes(x=Type, y=Freq, fill=Type)) + scale_fill_brewer(palette="Dark2") + theme_classic()+
  geom_violin(trim=F, kernel ="gaussian", adjust=3) +
    scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), limits = c(0 ,25), breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 5)) +
  geom_boxplot(width=0.1, fill="white")
  #stat_compare_means(comparisons = my_comparisons, label.y = c(16, 18, 20))+ # Add pairwise comparisons p-value
 # stat_compare_means(label.y = 22)     # Add global p-value

fig_B <- MSD_ggplot_list[["DiffCoef"]]+ 
  scale_fill_brewer(palette="Dark2") + theme_classic()+
  geom_violin(trim=F, kernel ="gaussian", adjust=1.5) +
    scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::unit_format(unit = "", scale = 1e12), expand = c(0, 0), limits = c(-0.4e-16 ,0.3e-12), breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 5)) +
  geom_boxplot(width=0.1, fill="white")

fig_C <- MSD_ggplot_list[["MSS_slope"]]+ 
  scale_fill_brewer(palette="Dark2") + theme_classic()+
  geom_violin(trim=F, kernel ="gaussian", adjust=1.5) +
  geom_boxplot(width=0.1, fill="white")+ 
   scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), limits = c(-1.5 ,1.5), breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 5)) + 
  geom_hline(yintercept=0.5, linetype="dashed", color = "red")

fig_D <- MSD_ggplot_list[["AvgDist"]]+ 
  scale_fill_brewer(palette="Dark2") + theme_classic()+
  geom_violin(trim=F, kernel ="gaussian", adjust=1.5) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::unit_format(unit = "", scale = 1e6), expand = c(0, 0), limits = c(0 ,2e-6), breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 5)) + 
  geom_boxplot(width=0.1, fill="white")

ggpubr::ggarrange(fig_A,fig_B,fig_C, fig_D,
                  labels = LETTERS[1:4],
                  ncol = 2, nrow = 2,  legend="none")
 
```

```{r}
ggsave(
  "avg_2.eps",
  plot = last_plot(),
  device = "eps")
```

```{r,  message = FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.width=6}
MSD_ggplot_list[["DiffCoef"]] + 
  scale_fill_brewer(palette="Dark2") + theme_classic()+
  geom_violin(trim=F, kernel ="gaussian", adjust=1.5) +
  geom_boxplot(width=0.1, fill="white")+
  stat_compare_means(comparisons = my_comparisons) 
  #geom_hline(yintercept=0.5, linetype="dashed", color = "red")
```

```{r,  message = FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.width=10}
fig_A<- fviz_pca_var (res.pca, 
             col.var="contrib", # Control variable colors using their contributions
             axes = 1:2, 
             gradient.cols = c("#00AFBB", "#E7B800", "#FC4E07"),
             repel = TRUE)

fig_B<- fviz_pca_ind(res.pca, col.ind = "cos2", # Control automatically the color of individuals using the cos2. cos2 = the quality of the individuals on the factor map
            # gradient.cols = c("#00AFBB", "#E7B800", "#FC4E07"),
             palette="npg",
            label="none",
            axes = c(1, 2),
             habillage = "Type", # Use gradient color
             repel = TRUE)

fig_C<- fviz_pca_ind(res.pca, col.ind = "cos2", # Control automatically the color of individuals using the cos2. cos2 = the quality of the individuals on the factor map
            # gradient.cols = c("#00AFBB", "#E7B800", "#FC4E07"),
             palette="npg",
            label="none",
            axes = c(1, 2),
             habillage = "Type", # Use gradient color
             repel = TRUE)

ggpubr::ggarrange(fig_A, fig_B, fig_C,
                  labels = c("A", "B", "C"), ncol = 3, nrow = 1, align="hv", legend="none")
```

```{r, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE}

targetDT<- MSD [, c(3:14)]

library(umap)
set.seed(12345)  

DT_sample_merge_imp.umap <- umap(targetDT, method="umap-learn", n_components= 5, n_neighbors=50)

library(Rtsne)
library(tsne)

set.seed(1234) 
DT_sample_merge_imp.tsne <- as.matrix(targetDT) %>% Rtsne(perplexity=50, dims=3, initial_dims=10, check_duplicates = FALSE) # Run TSNE
```

```{r}
layout <- DT_sample_merge_imp.umap$layout # DT_sample_merge_imp.umap$layout or DT_sample_merge_imp.tsne$Y
colnames(layout) <- paste0("UMAP_", 1:dim(layout)[2])

layout <- DT_sample_merge_imp.tsne$Y
colnames(layout) <- paste0("tSNE_", 1:dim(layout)[2])
```

```{r analysis3, message = FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.width=10}
ggplot(as.data.frame(layout), aes_string(x=colnames(layout)[1], y=colnames(layout)[2])) +  
  geom_point(aes(size=MSD$MSS_slope, colour = MSD$DiffCoef))  + 
  scale_color_gradient2(low = "blue", mid="white", high = "red", midpoint=0) +
  labs(x=colnames(layout)[1], y= colnames(layout)[2], color="DiffCoef", size="MSS_slope")+ 
  geom_rug(alpha=.5)

sp <- ggplot(as.data.frame(layout), aes_string(x=colnames(layout)[1], y=colnames(layout)[2])) +  
  geom_point(aes(size=MSD$DiffCoef, colour = MSD$Type))  + 
  labs(x=colnames(layout)[1], y= colnames(layout)[2], color="Type", size="MSS_slope")+ 
  geom_rug(col="darkred",alpha=.5)

ggMarginal(sp, groupColour = TRUE, groupFill = TRUE)
```

```{r, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

save.image(file=saved_path)
```

```{r}
# rename dataframe names within the dataframe list 

subfolder_name_list <- list.files(path =Path_1, full.names = F, recursive = FALSE)

names(df_1)[2:(length(df_list)+1)] <- subfolder_name_list[ grepl("R3D", subfolder_name_list) ]
```

```{r}
Path_1= "G:/EB3"
Rdata_list<- list.files(Path_1,
                      pattern = "df_list",
                     recursive = TRUE,  #list of subfolders and files within the subfolders
                     include.dirs = F, # Should subdirectory names be included 
                     full.name = TRUE)  #get the full name (path and file name) of each file
```

```{r}
df_1 <- t(df_1) %>% as.data.frame()
col<-df_1[1, ]
colnames(df_1) <- col
df_1<-df_1[-1, ]

df_1[]<- lapply(df_1, as.numeric)

df_1$X1<- rownames(df_1)
df_1$Arp3<-"WT"
df_1$Path<- dirname(Path_1)

saved_path <- paste(Path_1, "df_list.RData",  sep = "/")
save(df_list, df_1, csv_list, Path_1, file = saved_path)

```

```{r}
data_summary <- function(x) {
   m <- mean(x)
   ymin <- m-sd(x)
   ymax <- m+sd(x)
   return(c(y=m,ymin=ymin,ymax=ymax))
}

graph_list<- list()

graph_list[[1]]<- ggplot(df_1, aes(x= Arp3, y=growth_speed_median)) 
graph_list[[2]]<- ggplot(df_1, aes(x=Arp3, y=growth_lifetime_mean)) 
graph_list[[3]]<- ggplot(df_1, aes(x= Arp3, y=growth_length_mean))
```

```{r}
saved_path <- paste(Path_1, "df_list.RData",  sep = "/")
save(df_list, df_1, csv_list, Path_1, graph_list, file = saved_path)
csvPath<- paste(Path_1, "df_1.csv",  sep = "/")
write.csv(df_1[ ,c(4,7,10)], file=csvPath)
```

```{r, fig.width=2, fig.height=4, echo=FALSE}
graph_list[[1]] + 
  geom_violin(trim=FALSE, bw=1)+ 
stat_summary(fun.data=data_summary)+ 
  geom_dotplot(binaxis='y', stackdir='center', dotsize=1, binwidth = 0.2)

graph_list[[1]]+
  geom_violin(trim=FALSE, fill='#A4A4A4', color="darkred", bw=1)+
  geom_boxplot(width=0.5) + theme_minimal()
```
